message:
Fix off-by-one error in chunk count calculation

The previous formula `(compressed_bytes / DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE) + 1`
incorrectly always added 1, overcounting when compressed_bytes was
exactly divisible by chunk size (e.g., 8MB -> 2 chunks instead of 1).

Changed to use Rust's div_ceil() method for proper ceiling division:
`compressed_bytes.div_ceil(DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE).max(1)`

Added test_chunk_count_ceiling_division test to prevent regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
